2606.09709.title: IS-CoT: Breaking the Long-form Generation Collapse via Interleaved Structural Thinking
2606.09709.paper_summary: Generating coherent and controllable long-form content remains a persistent challenge for Large Language Models (LLMs). While reasoning-enhanced models have demonstrated success in logic-intensive domains, our evaluation reveals that they suffer from a severe length collapse in open-ended writing, where performance degrades sharply as target lengths exceed 2,000 words. We attribute this failure to the limitation of static hierarchical planning, which struggles to provide dynamic guidance over extended contexts. To bridge this gap, we introduce the Interleaved Structural Chain-of-Thought (IS-CoT) framework. Unlike external agentic workflows, IS-CoT embeds a dynamic Plan-Write-Reflect cycle into the generation process, enabling continuous strategy adaptation and global alignment without additional assistance. Based on this framework, we construct a high-quality dataset of interleaved reasoning traces via a multi-teacher pipeline and train IS-Writer-8B. Experiments demonstrate that IS-Writer-8B achieves state-of-the-art performance on challenging long-form benchmarks (e.g., +3.08 vs. DeepSeek-V3.2 on LongBench-Write), exhibiting robust length compliance and coherence competitive with significantly larger proprietary models.
2606.09709.paper_summary_zh: 生成連貫且可控的長篇內容對於大型語言模型（LLMs）仍然是一個持續的挑戰。雖然增強推理的模型在邏輯密集的領域中已顯示出成功，但我們的評估顯示它們在開放式寫作中遭遇嚴重的長度崩潰，當目標長度超過2000字時，性能急劇下降。我們將這一失敗歸因於靜態層級規劃的限制，該方法難以在延伸的上下文中提供動態指導。為了填補這一空白，我們引入了交錯結構思維鏈（IS-CoT）框架。與外部代理工作流程不同，IS-CoT將動態的計畫-寫作-反思循環嵌入生成過程中，使得在不需要額外協助的情況下實現持續的策略調整和全局對齊。基於這一框架，我們通過多教師管道構建了一個高質量的交錯推理痕跡數據集，並訓練了IS-Writer-8B。實驗表明，IS-Writer-8B在挑戰性的長篇基準測試中達到了最先進的性能（例如，在LongBench-Write上比DeepSeek-V3.2高出3.08），展現出強大的長度合規性和與顯著更大專有模型競爭的連貫性。
2606.09709.author: Zechen Sun et.al.
2606.09709.authors: Zechen Sun, Yuyang Sun, Zecheng Tang, Juntao Li, Wenpeng Hu, Wenliang Chen, Zhunchen Luo, Guotong Geng, Min Zhang
